purpose: Source-parts to generated-aggregate contract for large JSON consumer surfaces such as stage_control_plane and runtime-program current-program aggregates.
machine_boundary: This contract defines the OPL Pack Bundle assembly, manifest, write, and check surfaces. Editable source parts are the source of truth. Generated aggregate JSON is a consumer compatibility surface and must carry do_not_edit generated metadata. Bundle manifests record source entries and digests. Validation proves aggregate/source consistency only; it does not authorize domain ready, production ready, owner receipt, typed blocker, quality verdict, artifact authority, or domain truth mutation.

assembly_contract.source_truth_rule: source_root_ref and generated_array_fields[].source_dir_ref/order identify the editable source parts. aggregate_ref is regenerated from those source parts and is not edited directly.

manifest_contract.compatibility_rule: Generated aggregate JSON may stay tracked for consumers and diff review, but maintainers edit source parts and run write/check.
